utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five are present with detailed information for each: health_coverage includes type, cost, and details; property_coverage includes insurance type, coverage limit, and cost (even if 'included in total package'); travel_coverage includes coverage type, details, and cost specification; additional_services lists services and cost details; total_budget provides a full cost breakdown with monthly/annual values. Each section is fully specified according to what should be covered under each item, with all relevant details present.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes three main insurance components: health_coverage (PrimeHome Premium Coverage3), property_coverage (Home/contents insurance including adventure equipment), and travel_coverage (Global travel insurance with adventure sports), plus additional adventure-related services. To map these to the ground-truth ratings, I need to identify the closest matches in the provided database. 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage3' closely matches 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection → home_content, which has a rating of 6. The property_coverage description also aligns with the same 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' because it includes adventure equipment and business equipment coverage, so it maps to rating 6 as well. The travel_coverage covers adventure sports and global protection; this matches 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance (rating 6). The additional_services section includes 'adventure_travel_addon' and 'specialized_rescue_services', which correspond to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under travel_enhancement_services (rating 10). All other add-ons (e.g., global assistance, direct billing) are operational details not explicitly rated. Therefore, the mapped ratings are: PrimeHome Premium Coverage3 → 6, property_coverage → 6, travel_coverage → 6, and adventure_travel_addon → 10.
